service.name: AWS Lambda API
service.description_for_ai: Serverless compute. Run code without servers. Pay per 100ms execution. 1M free invocations/month forever. Supports Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. Use for event-driven functions, APIs, automation, processing.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Serverless compute. Run code without servers. Pay per 100ms execution. 1M free invocations/month forever. Supports Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. Use for event-driven functions, APIs, automation, processing. Invoke a Lambda function synchronously or asynchronously. Returns function response.

Payload.description: JSON payload to pass to function

agent_hints.sdk: Use AWS SDK (boto3/aws-sdk) for easier auth. Raw HTTP requires SigV4 signing.
agent_hints.free_forever: 1M invocations/month free forever — not just trial. Best serverless free tier.
agent_hints.cold_start: First invocation after idle period has ~100ms cold start. Provisioned concurrency eliminates this.
